name: Smono 4 Mouthpiece and Holder
summary: Smono 4 Mouthpiece and Holder — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: Maintain your Smono 4 vaporiser in optimal condition by utilizing the replacement Mouthpiece, which features a glass mouthpiece, metal holder, and two rubber seals. You can also keep one mouthpiece readily available for use while the other undergoes regular cleaning, which we recommend every 10-20 sessions, personalized to the user's needs. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
